title: Nanopore (without barcode)
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"2550m","text":"1. 含DNA禁止pipetting, vortex","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6bs7e","text":"2. 含DNA用輕彈、輕輕spin-down","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ep2eg","text":"3.使用filter tip","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7lgi3","text":"4. 多個樣本請放在水域槽或保冷孔盤","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"bn3g3","text":"1. 上機前先用QBIT測量DNA含量","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"cnfs3","text":"2. 多樣本用Nanopore (with barcode) protocol","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"cemgs","text":"3. 依樣本數數據量決定是否加barcode","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: 50 µL 中含有 100 fmol DNA之DDW
上NEBiocalculator計算DNA用量 並取出計算好用量的DNA 50μl 中含有100fmol DNA之DDW
ds:mass⇆moles
moles→mass
輸入DNA片段長度及DNA fmol 輸出DNA mass(ng) mass/conc.=DNA用量(μl)
取Step 1之 60 µL 產物
依序加入 7 µL End Repair & A-Tailing Buffer, 3 µL End Repair & A-Tailing Enzyme Mix
加入DDW至 50 µL
加完後vortex、離心數秒

放進水浴槽： Veriti 96-Well Thermal Cycler (Applied Biosystems, 4375786, https://www.thermofisher.com/order/catalog/product/4375786#/4375786 ) [nanopore_step1] sample要均分2管(每管30μl) 放在機器裡正中間的槽 [edit]確認流程 [run]之前改sample量
依序加入 5 µL AMX, 5 µL DI Water, 30 µL Ligation Buffer, 10 µL DNA Ligase Ligation Buffer 輕彈至完全混合 DNA Ligase先不要拿
放進水浴槽： Veriti 96-Well Thermal Cycler (Applied Biosystems, 4375786, https://www.thermofisher.com/order/catalog/product/4375786#/4375786 ) [Nanopore_step2] sample均分2管(每管55μl) [edit]確認流程 [run]之前改sample量
取Step 2之 110 µL 產物
加入 44 µL AMPure XP Beads 在9F 4度冰箱使用前先搖均勻
離心數秒
放置於磁座上，等待磁鐵吸附Beads
移除上清液 從液面開始吸，以免吸到beads；要吸乾淨，先用大的pipette再用小的
加入 250 µL LFB
持續輕彈離心管 00:03:00 小心不要噴到頂部
放在磁座上 等待磁鐵吸附beads
移除上清液，7~9步驟再重複一次 Ｗash兩次；Wash掉未帶有adapter再純化一次
加入 15 µL Elution Buffer
輕彈將磁珠彈離管壁
離心數秒；放置磁座上 放較上面一些，因sample量較少 等待磁鐵吸附beads
靜置 00:10:00 至 Room temperature
取 1 µL 測QBIT
creator: Hsin-Mao Wu
